zh.lifeSummary: Isobel de Home是Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass和Janet Hay的女兒，於1400年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾霍米。她和John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II至少有8個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1456年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Isobel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: Isobel de Home was born in 1400, in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland as the daughter of Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass and Janet Hay. She had at least 8 sons and 5 daughters with John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II. She died in 1456, in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Isobel de Home est née en 1400, à Home, Berwickshire, Écosse, fille de Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass et Janet Hay. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles avec John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II. Elle est décédée en 1456, à East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isobel de Homeは1400年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアホーメでAlexander Home of Home and DunglassとJanet Hayの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth IIとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1456年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアエアスト サルトウンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isobel de Home(은)는 1400년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 홈에서 Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass(와)과 Janet Hay의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 이스트 살토우에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isobel de Home родилась в 1400 г. в местности хом, бирвиккшир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass и Janet Hay. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей от John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II. Она умерла в 1456 г. в местности эаст салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет.
